name: Auracle
description: Auracle trading platform integration: engine status, connections, backtests, and live deployments
author: Auracle

claudePlugin.description: Research, backtest, walk-forward, preflight, ingestion, and manifest commands backed by the local Auracle engine

commands.name: research-ideas
commands.description: Scan recent research and synthesize strategy ideas

commands.name: draft-strategy
commands.description: Draft a provenance-linked strategy from a research finding

commands.name: transmog
commands.description: Transmog a research finding into a validated trading strategy

commands.name: deep-rank
commands.description: Re-rank the top research findings with sharpened hypotheses

commands.name: run-backtest
commands.description: Run a vectorized backtest on a strategy

commands.name: walk-forward
commands.description: Rolling out-of-sample walk-forward with regime diagnosis

commands.name: open-tearsheet
commands.description: Open the tearsheet for a recent job

commands.name: ingest-data
commands.description: Download and store historical daily bars

commands.name: backtest-manifest
commands.description: Backtest a manifest with no broker calls

panels.title: Backtest
panels.tooltip: Backtest the open strategy and check it for overfitting.

panels.title: Strategy Lab
panels.tooltip: Research, QC import, and validation — the build-and-prove pipeline in one place.

panels.title: Live Desk
panels.tooltip: Deployments, blotter, incidents, schedules, and runway — the live floor.
